title: Gravesite Plain
description: The vast opening expanse of the Land of Shadow, a mist-shrouded plain littered with the graves of countless warriors who followed Miquella into this forgotten realm. The withered remnants of a once-verdant land stretch beneath the shadow of the Erdtree's lesser counterpart.

title: Scadu Altus
description: A high plateau region bathed in perpetual shadow, elevated above the Gravesite Plain. This sweeping highland is dominated by the looming Shadow Keep and scattered ruins of a civilization that once thrived under Marika's shadow. The Scadutree fragments found here are key to surviving the Land of Shadow.

title: Shadow Keep
description: A colossal fortress at the heart of the Land of Shadow, built to guard the secrets of Marika's past. Its blood-soaked halls and towering ramparts house fearsome guardians and the echoes of a forgotten divine order. The keep serves as a nexus connecting several of the DLC's major regions.

title: Ancient Ruins of Rauh
description: The crumbling remnants of an ancient civilization predating the current age, nestled among massive trees and overgrown stonework. These ruins whisper of a time before the Erdtree's dominion, where forgotten gods and their servants once conducted sacred rites in towering temples now reclaimed by nature.

title: Rauh Ruins
description: A sprawling network of decayed temples and collapsed archways stretching across a misty highland, distinct from the deeper Ancient Ruins. Once a place of reverence for an older faith, the structures are now haunted by aberrant creatures and the spirits of priests who refused to abandon their posts.

title: Cerulean Coast
description: A hauntingly beautiful shoreline where pale blue waters lap against ash-grey sands beneath an eternally dim sky. The coast is strewn with the wreckage of ancient vessels and the remains of those who sought passage to or from the Land of Shadow, their journeys ending on these desolate shores.

title: Jagged Peak
description: A treacherous mountain range of shattered, knife-edged spires rising sharply from the Land of Shadow. The home of ancient dragons who predate the Erdtree's dominion, its perilous cliffs and narrow paths are scoured by fierce winds and guarded by draconic creatures of immense power.

title: Abyssal Woods
description: A pitch-black, foreboding forest of gnarled and leafless trees that seem to drink in all light. An oppressive silence hangs over this cursed woodland, home to the Midra and entities born of the frenzied flame. Torches are rendered useless here, and madness creeps into the minds of those who linger too long.

title: Hinterland
description: A remote and desolate fringe region at the furthest edges of the Land of Shadow, cut off from the rest by treacherous terrain and hostile inhabitants. The Hinterland feels older and more forsaken than even the ruins elsewhere, as though time itself has abandoned this bleak stretch of cursed earth.

title: Enir-Ilim
description: The divine pinnacle of the Land of Shadow, a celestial tower of blinding gold and immaculate stonework that pierces the heavens above all other landmarks. This is the seat of Miquella's grand design, where the Empyrean god shed his remaining humanity to complete his transformation, and where the final confrontation of the DLC unfolds.
